title: DownBelow
body:
t The Year is 2034, the Soviet Union has Reformed and is in another standoff with the United States of America.
Little did the Soviets know, the U.S. has been secretly storing Biological Weapons for warfare.
———————
One Day you were inside your home in Russia, when the biological Toxins were released infecting everything and everyone. Turning them into bloodthirst zombies or a foul eldritch creature.
———————
Your Goal is to survive.
———————
This is your story.

This mod-pack adds mutation craft, which turns creatures into parasites.
----------------
Your goal is to survive in this post-apocalyptic world.


If you have any issues, please contact me at: cbrown3914@outlook.com
